nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Keynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Caines
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Cahaignes in Eure, France, or Cahaynes in Calvados, France, both probably named with a Celtic element meaning ‘juniper bush’.

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Kahannes de Keynes Lord was born in 1065, in Northamptonshire, England, his father, Ralph de Chesney, was 21 and his mother, Lady Maud de Waterville, was 17. He had at least 1 son with Adelaide de Keynes. He died in 1131, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kahannes de Keynes Lord est né en 1065, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Chesney, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Waterville, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Adelaide de Keynes. Il est décédé en 1131, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kahannes de Keynes Lord 1065 in Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Chesney 21 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Waterville 17. Er hatte mit Adelaide de Keynes mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1131 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kahannes de Keynes Lord è nato il nel 1065 nel Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Ralph de Chesney, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Waterville, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Adelaide de Keynes. Morì nel 1131, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Kahannes de Keynes Lord(이)가 1065년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Chesney(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Waterville(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Adelaide de Keynes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1131년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Adelaide de Keynes. Ele faleceu em 1131, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kahannes de Keynes Lord родился в 1065 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Chesney было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Waterville, 17. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Adelaide de Keynes. Он умер в 1131 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 66 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Adelaide de Keynes. Murió en 1131, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 66 años.
